description: Wisdom rules seeded at genre-proposal time from a successful reflection. Expected to be curated + extended via future LEARN.5 wisdom-rule proposals as sessions in this genre accumulate.

rules.rule: The game world MUST auto-scroll horizontally, with the player character positioned on the left third of the screen.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Tapping and holding anywhere on the screen SHOULD activate the jetpack or equivalent mechanic, causing the character to ascend.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Obstacles such as stationary lasers, missiles, and rotating zappers MUST be avoided, with game over occurring upon first collision.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Coins or other collectibles SHOULD be arranged in arcs and lines to encourage strategic pathing.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: The game MUST track distance traveled and coins collected, displaying these at the top of the screen.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre
